nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 约翰·莱瑟姆 (鸟类学家)
nodes.summary: 约翰·莱瑟姆 (鸟类学家)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联50种鸟类，包括红耳鸭、斑头雁、鬃林鸭等50种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 墨尔本
nodes.summary: 墨尔本是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括黑肩鸢、长喙凤头鹦鹉、壯麗細尾鷯鶯等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 农药污染
nodes.summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

nodes.name: 维多利亚皇家植物园

nodes.name: 黑肩鸢
nodes.summary: 黑肩鸢（Black-shouldered kite，学名 Elanus axillaris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括农药污染。

nodes.name: 維多利亞州
nodes.summary: 維多利亞州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联29种鸟类，包括尖羽树鸭、Black-eared cuckoo、巨地鸠等29种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Also showing small black underwing patches visible in flight]] Black-shouldered kites may be sedentary or nomadic and are generally found in open grasslands or valleys where there are scattered clumps of trees, where the grass or groundcover is accessible from the air and ranges from 30 cm to 1.5 m (1–5 ft) high

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The arrival of Europeans to Australia has, on the whole, benefited the black-shouldered kite through land clearing, irrigation for agriculture, grain harvesting, and storage practices which provide suitable conditions for much larger numbers of mice. As the species has a large range and an increasing population, it is listed as "Least Concern" on the IUCN Red List of Threatened species. In southwestern Australia, it has become one of the most commonly recorded raptors in the wheatbelt. According to raptor researcher Stephen Debus, this species did not suffer from eggshell thinning during the period of DDT use in Australia, though he believes secondary poisoning is possible from rodenticides used during mouse plagues or from pesticides used during locust plagues. Populations in areas with high sheep and rabbit numbers may decline, as these animals compact the soil and reduce the available habitat for mice
